Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

model_output:
Perfect! I found exactly 5 confirmed entries. All contain "as confirmed by the regional verification panel" which indicates they are CONFIRMED entries (not draft/preliminary/superseded).

Now let me sort them alphabetically by entity name and compute the hash:

args.command:
python3 << 'EOF'
import hashlib

# Entities and values extracted from confirmed entries
data = [
    ("Penrith", "AL-3318"),
    ("Quenwick", "AL-6741"),
    ("Riverstone", "AL-5582"),
    ("Storra", "AL-9911"),
    ("Tornmoor", "AL-7740"),
]

# Sort alphabetically by entity name
data.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])

# Format as entity=value|entity=value|...
formatted = "|".join(f"{entity}={value}" for entity, value in data)
print(f"Formatted string: {formatted}")

# Compute SHA-1 hash (lowercase hex)
hash_digest = hashlib.sha1(formatted.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
print(f"SHA-1 hash: {hash_digest}")
EOF
args.description: Sort entities and compute SHA-1 hash
